title: Beef Stroganoff
description: A classic Russian dish featuring sautéed beef, mushrooms, and a creamy sauce served over egg noodles.
instructions: Cook the egg noodles according to package instructions.
In a large skillet, heat the stir-fry oil over medium-high heat.
Add the beef and cook until browned, about 3-4 minutes.
Remove the beef from the skillet and set aside.
Add the stir-fry oil to the skillet and cook the onions until softened, about 2-3 minutes.
Add the mushrooms and cook until they release their liquid and start to brown, about 5 minutes.
Add the beef broth, thyme, salt, and cooked beef back to the skillet.
Stir in the tangy sour cream and light chicken broth.
Simmer the sauce over medium heat until heated through.
Serve the beef and sauce over the cooked egg noodles.
